---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or an improvement to an existing one
title: "feat: "
labels: [enhancement]
---

**What would you like ForgeStack to do?**

**Why?**
The problem this solves or the workflow it improves. Concrete examples help.

**What have you considered?**
Any alternative approaches, workarounds you've tried, or prior art you know of.
